footer.blurb: Bringing the temple home with verified priests, live tracking and total transparency. Devotion you can trust — and see.

home.lead: Book personalized puja & chadhava at 1,000+ temples with verified priests, then follow your offering live — from sankalp to ritual to prasad at your door. Plus live darshan, astrology and a 5,000+ aarti library.
home.gaps_head: Devotion you can actually see happening
home.gaps_lead: Other apps take your money and leave you waiting. We built Aastha around the things devotees told us were broken.

gaps.p: A real timeline for every booking — priest assigned, sankalp recorded, ritual performed, video uploaded, prasad delivered. No more silence after payment.
Every pandit is credential-checked. We confirm your name & gotra pronunciation before the puja, and guarantee a full, unhurried ritual.
Consecrated prasad couriered home with a trackable shipment number, folded right into your order timeline.
Reach a real person by chat or call with a published response-time SLA — not an inbox that ignores you.
Every puja shows an all-inclusive price and an exact "what's included" list. No surprises at checkout.
Change your phone number yourself with dual-OTP verification. No login loops, no OTP stuck on an old number.

home.track_head: Track your puja like you track a parcel
home.track_lead: Enter a demo booking ID to see the transparency no other devotional app offers.
home.popular_lead: Performed by verified priests at India's most revered temples — every price all-inclusive.

steps.p: Pick from 1,000+ temples with clear, all-inclusive pricing.
We confirm pronunciation with you before the ritual.
Follow each stage on your timeline as it happens.
HD video within 48 hrs; prasad couriered to your door.

home.cmp_lead: The same devotion you expect — plus the transparency you deserve.
home.cmp_note: Comparison reflects publicly available features & common user feedback as of June 2026; for illustration. Sri Mandir, VAMA and Utsav do offer kundli-based puja suggestions — but as paid reports or astrologer consultations, not a free, instant, self-serve calculator whose recommended pujas are directly bookable and tracked.
cmp_features: Browse pujas by life goal (health, wealth…)
Add family & friends to one sankalp
Choose chadhava offerings à la carte
AI agent (Devi) — books, plays & tracks for you
Talk by voice — Devi listens & replies aloud
Bhakti radio — 23 Indian languages, real bhajans

testimonials.q: For the first time I could actually see when the priest was assigned and when the ritual happened. The prasad reached Pune in three days.
They called to confirm how to pronounce my late father's name before the shraddh puja. That small thing meant everything.
Booked a weekly subscription puja for my mother's health. The HD video arrives every Monday, on time, every single week.

home.cta_head: Your prayers deserve to be seen through.
home.cta_lead: Join Aastha and experience devotion with complete transparency — from sankalp to prasad at your door.

pujas_page.title: Book a puja or chadhava
pujas_page.intro: Every puja is performed by a credential-checked priest with an all-inclusive price and live tracking from sankalp to prasad.

calc_page.title: Puja Calculator
calc_page.intro: Enter your birth details for a real Vedic chart, your active doshas, and the pujas best suited to you right now — each one bookable and trackable in a tap.

plans_page.title: Choose your path of devotion
plans_page.intro: Start free, or join a membership that pays for itself the first puja — with included rituals, member pricing and Aastha's per-stage tracking, verified priests and transparent pricing on every booking.

directory.astro_empty_body: We only list real, credential-verified astrologers who have consented to be here — so this directory is being built carefully rather than filled with placeholders. Please check back shortly.
directory.priest_empty_body: Priest listings are sourced from official temple-trust records and published only when verified. Many temples don't release per-priest details — so this directory stays sparse and accurate rather than padded with invented names. Where a priest isn't listed, please use the temple's official booking channel.

astro_page.title: Talk to a verified astrologer
astro_page.intro: Real guidance from credential-checked Vedic astrologers — for career, marriage, kundli, vastu and remedies. Transparent per-minute pricing, with published credentials and experience shown up front.
astro_page.f1_body: Every astrologer is credential-checked, with experience and specialities shown openly.
astro_page.f2_body: You see the rate before you connect, and a live timer during the call. No upselling, no fear tactics.
astro_page.f3_body: If a remedy puja is recommended, book it in one tap — then track it from sankalp to prasad.

priests_page.title: Verified temple priests
priests_page.intro: Priests sourced from official temple-trust records and published only when verified. We prefer routing you through each temple's official booking channel rather than publishing personal contact details — and we list a priest's personal contact only with their recorded consent.
priests_page.f1_body: Listings come from temple-trust records — never invented names or numbers.
priests_page.f2_body: Personal phone numbers appear only with the priest's recorded consent; otherwise we route through the temple.
priests_page.f3_body: Every listed person can request an edit or removal in one click.
